description: A false-colour infrared satellite image depicts a mixed rural landscape featuring forests, agricultural fields, settlements, and a river. Dense vegetation, likely forests or woodlands, appears in dark red due to high near-infrared reflection, occupying the right side and large patches in the upper and lower central areas. Agricultural fields or open grassland are visible as lighter green-tan patches with irregular boundaries, some showing linear patterns indicative of cultivation, particularly in the central and upper-left regions. Built-up areas or individual buildings are represented by white and light blue patches, concentrated in a settlement in the upper-left, with smaller structures scattered throughout the fields. Winding light grey lines indicate roads or paths connecting these areas. A body of water, appearing light blue, flows along the left edge of the image, consistent with a river or stream. No scale bar or date information is visible.
